title: ARprod's Magic
description: Simple magic mod for those who don't like complicated stuff!
body:
Tired of all those magic mods having too many upgrades and mana bars?

Well, introduing 

![ARprod's Magic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/371dd2684053ac5637d3e5487d770d36f089c77d.png)

The mod currently has 7 different spell books:

-  Fire, which shoots a fireball
-  Fire Charge, which shoots a large fireball
-  Thunder, which spawns a lightning bolt
-  Water, which gives the player twice the air bubbles
-  Air, which resets the player's fall damage
- Phantoom, which allows the player to fly like in creative mode for 10 seconds
-  Love, which tames the nearest mob to the player
